ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_note" TEXT /* Project note or description */,
  "year_budgeted" INTEGER /* Year the project was budgeted */,
  "percent_completed" INTEGER /* Percentage of project completion */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Completed, In Progress) */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Ward where the project is located */,
  "functional_class" TEXT /* Functional class of the road (e.g., Principal Arterial, Local) */,
  "estimated_start_date" TEXT /* Estimated start date of the project */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the project */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the project */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or comments about the project */,
  "budget_approved" TEXT /* The budget amount approved by the city council */,
  "budget_spent" TEXT /* The amount of budget spent so far */,
  "contractor" TEXT /* The name of the contractor responsible for the project */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* The name of the supervisor overseeing the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* The type of project (e.g., Road Maintenance, Pavement Resurfacing) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* The priority level of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project location */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the location belongs to */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name where the project is located */,
  "quadrant" TEXT /* Quadrant of the city where the project is located */,
  "from_intersection" TEXT /* Starting intersection of the project */,
  "to_intersection" TEXT /* Ending intersection of the project */,
  "xcoord" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the project location */,
  "ycoord" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the project location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the project location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the project location */,
  "area" TEXT /* The area covered by the project (e.g., square meters) */,
  "gis_shape" TEXT /* The shape of the project area in GIS format (e.g., polygon coordinates) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_locations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the team belongs to */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "team_rep" TEXT /* Name of the team representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team representative */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the team representative */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the contractor responsible for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* The size of the project team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the team record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date the team record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
